description: Migrate Remaining 4 Agents to Enhanced Search Sections

test_strategy_covers_all_types.detail: Strategy covers unit tests (20 cases). Integration, E2E, security, and performance tests documented as not applicable for static markdown migration (with justification). This is a structural validation task -- no runtime code is produced.

test_cases_exist_for_all_requirements.detail: 20 test cases covering FR-006 through FR-009 (4 FRs, 20 ACs). Each FR has 5 test cases covering section presence, modality content, availability check, existing reference preservation, and frontmatter integrity.

traceability_matrix_complete.detail: 20 rows in traceability-matrix.csv mapping all 20 ACs across 4 FRs to test cases TC-U-038 through TC-U-057. 100% AC coverage.

coverage_targets_defined.detail: 100% requirement coverage (all 4 FRs fully tested). All 5 critical paths identified per agent.

test_data_strategy_documented.detail: test-data-plan.md documents agent file paths, boundary values (heading variations, frontmatter variations), invalid inputs (what should NOT match), maximum-size inputs, and expected values per agent.

critical_paths_identified.detail: 5 critical validation paths per agent: section presence, modality guidance, availability check, existing reference preservation, frontmatter integrity.

Article II - Test-First Development.evidence: Test cases designed in Phase 05 before implementation in Phase 06. 20 unit tests defined for all 4 agent migrations. Tests follow the exact pattern established by REQ-0042 (TC-U-026 through TC-U-037).

Article VII - Artifact Traceability.evidence: Traceability matrix maps all 20 acceptance criteria across 4 FRs (FR-006 through FR-009) to 20 test cases (TC-U-038 through TC-U-057). No orphan requirements. No orphan tests. 100% coverage.

Article IX - Quality Gate Integrity.evidence: All 6 GATE-05 checklist items pass. Test strategy, test cases, traceability matrix, and test data plan all produced and validated.

Article XI - Integration Testing Integri.evidence: Integration test coverage is provided by REQ-0042 integration tests which validate the Enhanced Search section consumption at framework level. For REQ-0043 specifically, the migration pattern is identical to the 6 agents already validated. Mutation testing planned for Phase 16.
